name: Ujaas Energy Limited
summary: Ujaas Energy Limited manufactures and sells solar power systems in India. It operates through Solar Power Generation and Maintenance; Manufacturing and Sale of Solar Power Plant; and EV segments. The company also develops, operates, owns, and maintains solar energy power plants under the UJAAS brand; and provides engineering, procurement, and construction solutions. Its products include various transformers, including convertor and special purpose transformers, power transformers, distribution transformers, and arc furnace and induction furnace transformers; and offers electric scooters. The company was formerly known as M and B Switchgears Limited and changed its name to Ujaas Energy Limited in August 2013. Ujaas Energy Limited was founded in 1979 and is based in Indore, India.
